Formed through JD.com's strategic acquisition of the legacy retail giant 'Jiangsu Five Star Appliance', it boasts a staggering fully paid-in capital of nearly 2.1 billion RMB (2,095,350,000 RMB) and an active workforce of 1,616 insured employees (2024). Its registered address ('Part of 1st and 2nd Floor, No. 241 Zhongshan North Road') is a massive flagship retail store/commercial complex in a prime urban area, fundamentally impossible for industrial manufacturing.
